item.title: They Took Care of Him & He Took Their Lives!
item.description: The details of this case? Absolutely chilling. I cannot even begin to imagine the horrors the witnesses experienced, with blood leaking out of that haunted suitcase. the contents of it revealing an even darker secret...

media:content.media:title: They Took Care of Him & He Took Their Lives!
media:content.media:description: The details of this case? Absolutely chilling. I cannot even begin to imagine the horrors the witnesses experienced, with blood leaking out of that haunted suitcase. the contents of it revealing an even darker secret...
